creator: stefan@FreeBSD.org
text:
Submitter replied in private mail:

----- Forwarded message from Ralph Zitz <ralph@imada.sdu.dk> -----

From: Ralph Zitz <ralph@imada.sdu.dk>
Subject: Re: ports/127377: java/netbeans61 fails to make internet connections
To: Stefan Walter <stefan@freebsd.org>
Date: Thu, 12 Feb 2009 10:53:10 +0100

Hi Stephan

I have now tested the following  (on amd64):

setting the sysctl "net.inet6.ip6.v6only=0" in /etc/sysctl.conf
compiled jdk16 without ipv6 support, and now the javaplugin for the  
browser works, and so does netbeans.

Regards,
Ralph Zitz.
----- End forwarded message -----
